commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d75f5e017b60d8c1c60c247a7620f5422da48e6d)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a shared title-keyed slug resolver for memory-wiki synthesis creation and source ingest, plus collision regression tests.

PR surface: Source +42, Tests +128. Total +170 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows both create_synthesis and wiki ingest derive page identity from the bare slug, and the PR body provides before/after temp-vault output for the synthesis collision path; I did not run commands because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the helper and add one raw-source collision regression on the existing PR branch; no product direction is needed.

target.title: fix(memory-wiki): prevent distinct titles from silently overwriting each other
target.author: yetval
